case_title: LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP LLC VS. YEABSERA SHIFFERAW

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$100.00) [SERVICE MADE AT CLAY STREET ADDRESS IN OAKLAND, CA] SERVED SEP-20-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHIFFERAW, YEABSERA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO FEB-02-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LIBERTY PROPERTIES GROUP LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YEABSERA SHIFFERAW IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALLED DEPT. 506 AT THE START OF THE CALENDAR TO STATE SHE IS HAVEING A MEDICAL EMERGENCY. JUDGE FLORES WAS INFORMED OF THE DEFENDANT'S REQUEST AND GRANTED A CONTINUANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
